title.value: Mission of Assistance to the Master's degree 'AMOA' for the implementation of the projects of the Digital Transformation Programme for Citizen-Oriented Public Services 'GovTech'

project_description.value: Framework, study and specification of needs; Development of specifications according to the model requirements of the World Bank; Follow-up of project implementation; Assistance in validating deliverables and receiving solutions; Definition of organizational and operational framework of implemented solutions; Technical assistance for capacity building of UFP

scope_of_work.value: Framework, study and specification of needs; Development of specifications according to the model requirements of the World Bank; Follow-up of project implementation; Assistance in validating deliverables and receiving solutions; Definition of organizational and operational framework of implemented solutions; Technical assistance for capacity building of UFP

required_experience.value: Experience in computer engineering, development of information systems, deployment/reception of telecom services and technology consulting; Experience under similar conditions

required_documents.value: Brochures, references concerning the performance of similar contracts, experience under similar conditions, availability of necessary knowledge among staff, etc.

evaluation_criteria.value: Company strength (30 points), Human means (staff and number of employees) (5 points), Executives (15 points), References (70 points)

relevance_reason.value: The project involves the development and implementation of digital transformation projects for citizen-oriented public services.

title.value: Mission d'appui aux suivi et à la qualité des projets de implementation du programme E-Gov du PNS 2020

project_description.value: Support the implementation of the National Strategic Plan "Tunisia Digitale 2020" and support the monitoring and quality of projects to implement the E-Gov programme of the PNS 2020

scope_of_work.value:
- Setting needs
- Design and specifications
- Assistance during implementation
- Recipe and commissioning
- Transfer of skills
- Quality control
- Scheduling, piloting and coordination
- Knowledge management and capacity building in project management

required_documents.value:
- A letter of intention
- A presentation of the company
- Legal documents for creation and registration
- Financial statements for the last 3 years
- Certifications and performance proof

relevance_reason.value: The project involves e-government services and requires technical expertise.

title.value: Mission of Assistance to the Master's degree 'AMOA' for the implementation of the projects of the Digital Transformation for Citizen-Oriented Public Services programme 'GovTech'

project_description.value: The mission involves providing support services for the implementation of the GovTech programme aimed at digital transformation for citizen-oriented public services in Tunisia.

deliverables.value: Mission 1: Framework, study and specification of needs; Mission 2: Development of specifications / TDRs according to the requirements of the World Bank; Mission 3: Monitoring of project implementation; Mission 4: Assistance in validating deliverables and receiving solutions; Mission 5: Definition and implementation of the organizational and operational framework for implementation solutions; Mission 6: Technical assistance to strengthen the capacity of the PFU

roles_profiles.value: One Head of Mission; A central BMP; An AMOA Social sector; An AMOA Administrative reform sector; An AMOA for monitoring other sectors; An SI Architecture Expert

relevance_reason.value: The mission involves providing support services for the implementation of digital transformation projects in Tunisia's public sector.
